changes.description: Fixed header overflow with stacked CLIENT/RUN labels, added client/run switcher with toggle panel
Added SECTION_CONTEXT map and contextual framing header with title, purpose, focus, type, and back-to-overview button
Added clientRuns prop passthrough to SQONavigation, added onNavigateOverview prop to SQOWorkspacePanel
Added resolveClientList import, included clientRuns in both success and error return paths
Added CSS for identity layout, switcher, panel header framing; replaced single-line client class
23 tests in 7 suites covering header overflow, switcher, overview anchor, framing, navigation, governance
Added test:sqo-stabilization script and included in aggregate test
